name: vortos/vortos-audit-admin
description: Admin HTTP API for the Vortos Audit spine — platform (cross-tenant, .any) and org-own (.own, via TenantContext) keyset read / chain-verify / signed-export endpoints over AuditAdminService. RBAC-gated, 2FA step-up on export. Mounts into the host vortos-http pipeline; apps stop hand-writing audit controllers.
